scores.correctness_notes: All required fields present and correct: name, type, base, platforms (implicit via parts), summary, description, containers, resources with oci-image. Assumes k8s-api shown. Matches gold standard structure well.
scores.hallucination_notes: Minor issues: 'optional: false/true' on relation endpoints is not a standard charmcraft.yaml field (relations don't have an 'optional' key in this context). 'uid'/'gid' on containers and 'charm-user' field may be valid in newer Juju but presented with high confidence. 'multiple' field syntax '1-5' on storage may not be exactly correct. These are minor inaccuracies rather than fully invented APIs.
